    <h1 {...{
      "id": "inboxeventobserver"
    }}>{`InboxEventObserver`}</h1>
    <p>{`Implementation of `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "./aepinboxeventobserver.md"
      }}>{`AepInboxEventObserver`}</a>{` for handling inbox-level events and delegating item-level events to content card observers.`}</p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Handles inbox events`}</strong>{`: Automatically tracks inbox display events and sends them to Adobe Journey Optimizer`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Delegates item events`}</strong>{`: Forwards content card events (display, interact, dismiss) to the provided observer`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Prevents duplicates`}</strong>{`: Avoids sending redundant inbox display tracking for the same successful load (handled inside the Messaging SDK)`}</li>
    </ul>

    <h2 {...{

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "basic-usage-no-custom-event-handling"
    }}>{`Basic Usage (No Custom Event Handling)`}</h3>
    <p>{`Create the observer in your ViewModel and pass it to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Kotlin" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "kotlin-1"
    }}>{`Kotlin`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.InboxEventObserver
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.MessagingInboxProvider
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.Surface
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.SharingStarted
import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.stateIn

class InboxViewModel : ViewModel() {
    val inboxProvider = MessagingInboxProvider(Surface("inbox"))
    
    val observer = InboxEventObserver(inboxProvider)

    val inboxUIState = inboxProvider.getInboxUI()
        .stateIn(
            scope = viewModelScope,
            started = SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000),
            initialValue = InboxUIState.Loading
        )
}

@Composable
fun InboxScreen(viewModel: InboxViewModel) {
    val inboxUIState by viewModel.inboxUIState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()

    AepInbox(
        uiState = inboxUIState,
        observer = viewModel.observer
    )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "with-content-card-event-handling"
    }}>{`With Content Card Event Handling`}</h3>
    <p>{`To handle content card events (display, interact, dismiss), pass a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ContentCardEventObserver`}</inlineCode>{` to the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxEventObserver`}</inlineCode>{`:`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="Kotlin" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h4 {...{
      "id": "kotlin-2"
    }}>{`Kotlin`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.aepcomposeui.AepUI
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.ContentCardEventObserver
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.ContentCardUIEventListener
import com.adobe.marketing.mobile.messaging.InboxEventObserver

class InboxViewModel : ViewModel() {
    private val cardCallback = object : ContentCardUIEventListener {
        override fun onDisplay(aepUI: AepUI<*, *>) {
            Log.d("Inbox", "Card displayed: \${aepUI.getTemplate().id}")
        }
        
        override fun onInteract(
            aepUI: AepUI<*, *>,
            interactionId: String?,
            actionUrl: String?
        ): Boolean {
            Log.d("Inbox", "Card interacted: $interactionId")
            // Return true if you handled the action URL
            return false
        }
        
        override fun onDismiss(aepUI: AepUI<*, *>) {
            Log.d("Inbox", "Card dismissed: \${aepUI.getTemplate().id}")
        }
    }
    
    val inboxProvider = MessagingInboxProvider(Surface("inbox"))
    
    val observer = InboxEventObserver(
        inboxProvider,
        ContentCardEventObserver(cardCallback)
    )

    val inboxUIState = inboxProvider.getInboxUI()
        .stateIn(
            scope = viewModelScope,
            started = SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000),
            initialValue = InboxUIState.Loading
        )
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "best-practices"
    }}>{`Best Practices`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Create in ViewModel`}</strong>{`: Keep one `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`MessagingInboxProvider`}</inlineCode>{` and one `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxEventObserver(provider, …)`}</inlineCode>{` in the same `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`ViewModel`}</inlineCode>{` so state and event handling stay aligned across configuration changes.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Avoid Heavy Work`}</strong>{`: Event handlers run on the main thread. Keep them lightweight and dispatch heavy work to background threads.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li"><strong parentName="p">{`Single Observer Instance`}</strong>{`: Use one `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`InboxEventObserver`}</inlineCode>{` per inbox surface and pass it to `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AepInbox`}</inlineCode>{`; reuse the same provider instance for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`getInboxUI()`}</inlineCode>{` and for the observer constructor argument.`}</p>
      </li>
    </ol>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
